title: DRW MD-DRW-535: Encryption Module PCB
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-535 Rev E — Encryption Module PCB

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1127, P-1128, P-1129.
4. Drawn by Rowan Ellery, checked by Priya Nair, approved by Felix Herrera.
